case_title: WAFFLES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. VS LABUE, RICHARD IND & DBA FAT RICHARD'S

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $780.00 FILED BY WAFFLES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LABUE, RICHARD IND & DBA FAT RICHARD'S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LABUE, RICHARD IND & DBA FAT RICHARD'S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAFFLES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LABUE, RICHARD IND & DBA FAT RICHARD'S PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
